title: Miners Beat Bitcoin by 70% in 2026 as Terawulf Locks $12.8B in AI Contracts
text: TeraWulf's stock has significantly outperformed Bitcoin's price appreciation in 2026, with WULF shares up approximately 109% year-to-date versus Bitcoin's more modest gains. This outperformance reflects market recognition of TeraWulf's successful pivot to AI and HPC infrastructure. The company has secured approximately $12.8 billion in contracted revenue from long-term HPC leasing agreements, primarily driven by partnerships with Fluidstack and Core42. These contracts provide multi-year, fixed-revenue streams backed by investment-grade counterparties, dramatically reducing the volatility inherent in Bitcoin mining operations. The market's strong appreciation of WULF shares reflects investor confidence that the company's business model transformation will drive stable, predictable earnings growth over the next several years. With 522 critical IT MW under long-term contracts and additional capacity coming online throughout 2026, TeraWulf is positioned to establish itself as a leading AI compute infrastructure provider.
